traits.name: Amphibious
traits.description: The dragon can breathe air and water.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The dragon makes two Rend attacks.

actions.name: Rend
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) Slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Poison Breath (Recharge 5-6)
actions.description: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 11, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 21 (6d6) Poison damage. Success: Half damage.

tactical_info.environment: Forest strongholds, poisonous swamps, ancient woodland ruins, territorial hunting grounds
tactical_info.tactics: Uses poison breath for area control, amphibious mobility to escape or ambush, prefers hit-and-run tactics
tactical_info.weaknesses: Still young and learning, lacks legendary actions, relatively low hit points for a dragon
